from importlib.metadata import version, PackageNotFoundError

try:
    __version__ = version("myapp")
except PackageNotFoundError:
    __version__ = "0.0.0"

import pkg_resources

_dist = pkg_resources.get_distribution("myapp")
__version__ = _dist.version
__build__ = _dist.parsed_version

from myapp.core import engine
from myapp.api import router
from myapp.db import session
